top_signals.title: Ryanair hands O’Leary six-year extension
top_signals.summary: Ryanair boss Michael O’Leary is set to remain in his role as chief executive for another six years after agreeing a fresh contract with the budget airline, including an enormous pay packet that could see him handed 10m additional shares.  The Dublin-based carrier said the veteran chief executive’s contract will run until April 2032, following [...]
